name: Oberkil!
description: With a Torgue barrel, the Oberkil! fires a huge cluster of pellets for massive close-range damage. It kicks hard, spreads widely, and shoots very slowly while consuming 4 shells per trigger pull. Precision is effectively impossible, and it is unreliable beyond point-blank range. Used up close, it can blanket the area ahead with pellets and tear through targets without careful aiming.
notes: Only appears at blue rarity or higher.
